# Pull Request

> **Title format (Conventional Commits):** `type(scope)!: short summary`
> Examples: `feat(cli): add BROWSETUI edit mode`, `fix(index): correct SEEK exact-match`

## Summary
<!-- What and why. Keep it tight. -->

## Type
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] perf
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] build/ci
- [ ] chore
- [ ] test
- [ ] style

## Scope (check all that apply)
- [ ] CLI (DotTalk++)
- [ ] TUI / Browse
- [ ] Indexing / SEEK / LOCATE
- [ ] Memo sidecar (.dtx)
- [ ] Build scripts (PowerShell/CMake)
- [ ] Python (pycrud / pydottalk)
- [ ] Java Web UI (Spring Boot)
- [ ] Other: _<what>_

## PDLC Checklist
- [ ] Issue/Task ID referenced (e.g., #123)
- [ ] Design doc or brief rationale included/linked (for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] **CHANGELOG.md** updated under **[Unreleased]**
- [ ] Docs updated (README/USAGE/help text)

## Breaking Changes?
- [ ] Yes (document and bump version if needed)
- [ ] No

## Testing
<!-- How did you test? Commands/logs, datasets, screenshots. -->

## Notes for Release
<!-- Anything maintainers should call out in release notes. -->

Closes #
